title: Sentinelx
description: All-in-one plugin, chat moderation, anti-spam, command cooldowns, per-rank limits, region command blocking, item blacklist, exploit protection, safe /back teleport, LuckPerms, WorldGuard, WorldEdit, ProtocolLib, lightweight, Paper 1.21+
body:
🛡️ SentinelX

All-in-One Moderation, Security & Control Plugin

Paper 1.21.11+ | Built for Performance, Designed for Control

ProtocolLib is required for advanced packet-level protection and security features — [Click Here](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/)


---

SentinelX is a powerful yet lightweight server control plugin designed to replace multiple plugins with one optimized solution. Built for performance-focused servers that need advanced moderation, intelligent security, and complete in-game control without unnecessary bloat.

From moderation tools to security systems and advanced management features, SentinelX delivers everything in one cohesive plugin.


---

What's New in v2.0-b8

GUI Report System

A fully interactive inventory-based report management system for staff teams.

Interactive GUI-based report management

Filter reports by player, resolved status, or priority

Toggle resolved and priority states directly from the GUI

Quick report deletion support

Color-coded report states for easier moderation management



---

Improved Anti-VPN Detection

Enhanced VPN and proxy detection reliability.

Automatic fallback system if ProxyCheck.io becomes unavailable

Displays active detection provider during startup

Configurable fallback settings in antivpn.yml



---

Console & Startup Improvements

Cleaner and more professional console output.

Colored startup messages

Improved startup layout design

Module status display during startup



---

Smart Chat Moderation

Protect your community without disrupting normal conversations.

Anti-spam and flood protection

Similar message detection

Caps limiter

Anti-advertising protection

Accurate IPv4 detection with reduced false positives

Regex and custom phrase filtering

Global and rank-based chat cooldowns

Staff bypass permissions

Proper per-player cooldown handling



---

Advanced Command Control

Fine-tune command usage with complete flexibility.

Flexible command cooldowns

Rank and permission-based cooldown support

Per-command bypass permissions

Automatic command scheduling

Fully in-game management system

Improved compatibility with LuckPerms and permission plugins



---

Location-Based Restrictions

Control commands based on regions or worlds.

WorldGuard integration

WorldEdit area support

Region-based command restrictions

Ideal for spawn areas, events, and protected zones



---

Advanced Item Blacklist

Deep-level protection against unwanted or illegal items.

Material-based item blocking

Protection against rename and NBT bypass methods

Inventory and container scanning

Crafting, pickup, drop, and exploit prevention

Packet-level protection with ProtocolLib support



---

Reliable /back System

A dependable teleport recovery system.

Exact location and rotation restoration

Cross-world and dimension support

Automatic location saving

Configurable cooldown support



---

Live Management

Make changes instantly without restarting your server.

Real-time rule management

Instant updates

Async saving system

Config-controlled behavior and messages



---

Performance & Security

Built for modern servers that require stability and scalability.

Async-safe architecture

Packet-safe inventory handling

Exploit prevention systems

Lightweight and optimized design

Suitable for both small servers and large networks



---

Why Choose SentinelX?

One Plugin. Complete Control.
Replace multiple plugins with one optimized solution.

Performance Focused.
Designed to minimize impact while maintaining powerful features.

Reliable Security.
Protection against bypass methods, exploits, and abuse.

Real-Time Management.
Apply changes instantly without reloads or restarts.


---

Installation

1. Download SentinelX


2. Place it inside your /plugins folder


3. Restart your server


4. Configure and manage everything in-game


5. Install ProtocolLib for enhanced protection features




---

Developed by ItzPritam

SentinelX gives server owners powerful moderation, advanced security, and complete control in one lightweight solution.
